data.raceComments: {"comment":"8. MOMENTO has not been beaten far in her last couple of starts, including her last run at Wingatui when finishing sixth as the favourite at Wingatui nearly 3 weeks ago. She will need some luck from a wide gate, but this field is not strong, and Corey Campbell is riding as well as anyone at the moment. Each way. 11. FULL CREAM made the most of the pole position when finishing third here 2 weeks ago, and even though she has a nasty gate this time, she likes it here, and she is worth including in all combinations. 5. DUBONNET ROUGE resumed with a gutsy effort for second here 5 weeks ago, and she has enough scope to go one better in this. 1. LEONARD finished a bold fourth at Riccarton 5 days ago. That form will hold up in this. Include.","runners":[8,11,5,1],"exclusive":true}
